economics_caveats.cost_per_loc:
Cost-per-LOC metric (tokens / lines of code) captures token spend only from fleet ledger (parallel Haiku execution). It does NOT include:
  - Fable orchestrator main-thread tokens (token tracking on MCP side only)
  - Manual human review/decision time
  - Deprecated code or deleted branches
Limitations:
  - LOC counts from git ls-files (current HEAD); doesn't reflect deleted branches
  - Ledger entries are only recorded on successful/failed agent runs
  - Missing/stale ledger will underestimate costs
economics_caveats.cost_per_merged_pr:
Cost-per-PR metric captures spend only from shipped merges, using commit message pattern 'Merge pull request #N'. It does NOT include:
  - Abandoned PRs or branches
  - Main-thread Fable tokens
  - Spike/spike work that never merged
Limitations:
  - Depends on GitHub merge message format; non-GitHub workflows may not count
  - PRs with no ledger entries are still counted (incomplete cost attribution)
economics_caveats.cost_per_wave:
Cost-per-wave metric infers wave count from commit messages containing 'wave-N'. It does NOT include:
  - Implicit waves without naming
  - Manual work outside the tracked waves
Limitations:
  - Requires strict 'wave-N' naming; ad-hoc commits may create false waves
  - Fallback to release tags (v*) if no wave messages found
  - Wave boundaries not validated against STATE.md
economics_caveats.unit_economics:
Unit cost economics (cost per backlog item, cost per passing test) uses merged PRs as a proxy for backlog items. Limitations:
  - Assumes every PR == one backlog item (may overcounts parallel work)
  - Does NOT count test count metrics (passing tests require separate test ledger)
  - Cost proxy uses total tokens / PR count; doesn't attribute costs per test
Future: Requires tracker integration + test ledger for accurate cost-per-test
economics_caveats.cost_estimates:
Dollar cost estimates require aesop.config.json pricing map in format:
  {"pricing": {"model-id": {"input_per_mtok": 0.80, "output_per_mtok": 4.0}}}
If pricing is missing or model not in map, no estimate provided.
Limitations:
  - Pricing based on model type; no dynamic rate adjustments (batch, volume)
  - Doesn't account for regional pricing, tax, or discounts
  - Tokens counted only from successful ledger entries
